The '''T-47I Airspeeder''' was [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom's]] successor to the popular [[T-47 airspeeder/Legends|T-47 airspeeder]]. It went out of production around [[10 BBY/Legends|10 BBY]], but remained popular with adolescents and youths due to the ease of maintenance and prevalence of spare parts.<ref name="RPG2RE" />

The [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeder]] was 4.5 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] long and required one [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]]. It carried 10 [[Kilogram/Legends|kilograms]] of cargo but no passengers. The speeder could achieve 650 [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] per [[Standard hour/Legends|hour]] and had a flight ceiling of 250 meters.<ref name="RPG2RE" />
